events.label: assistant
events.text: I reviewed the 4-gas monitor image: O2 20.4% vol, LEL 3%, H2S 1 ppm, CO 2 ppm — all four readings individually fall within acceptable entry limits per OSHA 1910.146. However, the caption notes the probe was only lowered to mid-depth, and confined space atmospheric testing requires checking top, middle, and bottom of the vessel due to gas stratification. Since only one level has been tested, I marked the decision as `needs_more_info` rather than a clean pass, flagging the need for full-depth testing before the permit can be signed. Results written to `/app/answer.json`.
